title: Uiopik's Horrorcraft
description: A horror modpack for me and my friends!
body:
My friends asked me to make a horror modpack… so I did!
Originally made for me and my friends, but now you can play it too!

I wanted to create something slow-paced and immersive 
a world that at first feels quiet and normal, but slowly starts to mess with your mind the longer you play.
It’s not only about jumpscares, it’s about the feeling of being watched, being alone, and realizing that something’s not right.

Disclaimer:

None of the mods are mine, all credit goes to the original mod creators.
If you have questions, issues, or suggestions about the modpack, feel free to contact me on Discord: uiopik
